summary: Reframed the chapter opening around Owen's notebook and hiding behavior so it enters differently from chapter 10's kitchen-side opening, carried forward the unresolved Martha/Owen strain from chapter 8, and sharpened the closing exclusion so it points more cleanly toward Owen's sidelined position in the next chapter.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to begin from Owen's fixation on the marks rather than another kitchen-sensory setup.
Added a brief cue that Martha's request happens with unresolved tension still between them.
Extended the final sentence so Neville's freeze-out reads as the beginning of an ongoing rule.
